subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the dominion of My Name, the Most Merciful, the All-Compassionate, wherein is mentioned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من جبروت اسمی الرحمن الرحیم و یذکر فیه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
